idx.hero.desc: We transform human resources from an operational support function into a strategic lever that impacts business results. We build systems that work, not just talk.
idx.feat.title: Why Derin Akademi?
idx.feat.desc: Not off-the-shelf training packages; measurable and sustainable solutions tailored to your institution.
idx.feat.01.title: Results-Oriented Approach
idx.feat.01.desc: Every project starts with goals tied to concrete business outcomes and measurable transformation. Not just training or consulting, but real change.
idx.feat.02.title: Custom-Built Design
idx.feat.02.desc: Solutions are not off-the-shelf; they are designed specifically around the institution's goals, culture and maturity level.
idx.feat.03.title: Behavioral Transformation
idx.feat.03.desc: We don't just transfer knowledge; we aim to fundamentally transform management, decision-making and communication styles.
idx.feat.04.title: AI-Powered Learning
idx.feat.04.desc: AI-powered, institution-specific content and 24/7 accessible digital avatar support for continuous learning.
idx.feat.05.title: Flexible Training Formats
idx.feat.05.desc: From in-person classroom training to online interactive programs — the format that fits your institution best.
idx.feat.06.title: Real-World Application
idx.feat.06.desc: We combine academic knowledge with real business insights to deliver practical solutions beyond conventional models.
idx.feat.07.title: Measurable Training Outcomes
idx.feat.07.desc: We target measurable success tracking, performance transformation and results that directly impact business outcomes.
idx.train.title: Behavioral & Decision-Making
idx.train.desc: From leadership to data, from performance to belonging — tailored training programs for your institution.
idx.sectors.title: Shared Transformation
idx.sectors.desc: From finance to agriculture, healthcare to retail — we have carried the responsibility of transformation with more than 40 institutions.
idx.testi.title: They Transformed, Now It's Your Turn
idx.testi.desc: Real stories, real transformations. Experiences from hundreds of professionals across 40+ institutions.
idx.cta.desc: Let's take the first step to transform your human resources into a strategic asset. Contact us for solutions tailored to your institution.
idx.testi.1.text: The Strategic HR Management program we conducted with Derin Akademi completely transformed our HR function. We are now positioned as a strategic partner at the board level.
idx.testi.1.name: Ayşe Kara
idx.testi.2.text: Derin Akademi was the only real guide by our side during our institutionalization process. The transition to the 3rd generation is no longer a crisis, but a planned journey.
idx.testi.2.name: Ali Yalçın
idx.testi.3.text: Thanks to the Performance 360 program, we moved from annual evaluations to a continuous feedback system. Our employee satisfaction increased by 34%.
idx.testi.3.name: Elif Demir
idx.testi.4.text: The Interview Skills 5.0 training completely changed our recruitment quality. We now focus on not losing the right candidate rather than finding them.
idx.testi.4.name: Mehmet Öz
idx.testi.5.text: With the AI in HR training, our team learned to integrate ChatGPT and AI tools into daily HR processes. The efficiency difference is incredible.
idx.testi.5.name: Zeynep Aras
idx.testi.6.text: With compensation and reward system consulting, we transformed our structure into a transparent, market data-driven model. Internal inequity is no longer on the agenda.
idx.testi.6.name: Burak Eren
idx.testi.7.text: The Employee Experience and Belonging Design program enabled us to redesign the entire employee journey. Our turnover rate dropped 28% in the first year.
idx.testi.7.name: Selin Aksoy
idx.testi.8.text: With the New Generation Leadership program, our mid-level managers adopted a coaching leadership approach. Visible improvement in team performance.
idx.testi.8.name: Can Yıldız
idx.testi.9.text: With the Data-Driven HR Management training, we built our HR dashboards and completely transformed our board-level reporting quality.
idx.testi.9.name: Deniz Koç

danis.approach.desc: We don't produce pretty presentations, thick reports and theoretical recommendations. We build practical and measurable systems that address your institution's realities.
danis.approach.1.title: Diagnose First, Solve Second
danis.approach.1.desc: We don't propose solutions without in-depth analysis of the problem. Every consulting process starts with understanding your institution.
danis.approach.2.title: We Build With You
danis.approach.2.desc: We don't impose solutions from outside; we design them together with your people. Ownership brings sustainability.
danis.approach.3.title: Always Custom-Built
danis.approach.3.desc: We don't offer template solutions. Every intervention is customized based on your institution's culture, size and industry.
danis.approach.4.title: What Can't Be Measured Can't Change
danis.approach.4.desc: We define success criteria and measurement mechanisms from the start in every consulting process. We monitor results together.
danis.approach.5.title: Continuously Learning System
danis.approach.5.desc: We don't leave when consulting ends. We ensure your institution becomes a self-learning, self-adapting structure.
danis.approach.6.title: 30 Years in the Field
danis.approach.6.desc: Our recommendations are not academic; they are fed by field experience. Our founder Hakan Selahi's 30+ years of practical knowledge plays an active role in every project.
danis.sectors.desc: We have worked with institutions across many different sectors, including finance, manufacturing, industry, agriculture, healthcare, retail and education.
danis.cta.desc: Share which area you need, and we'll recommend a consulting program and approach. The first consultation is free.
hkm.hero.title: Years of Experience in Training & HR Consulting
hkm.hero.desc: Derin Akademi is a consulting and training company specializing in human resources. We transform HR from an operational support function into a strategic lever that impacts business results.
hkm.felsefe.title: We Build Systems That Work, Not Just Talk
hkm.felsefe.desc1: Derin Akademi is a consulting and training company that manages transformation together with institutions in the human resources field. Instead of selling conventional training or offering superficial consulting, we design customized, applicable and sustainable solutions tailored to each institution's needs.
hkm.felsefe.desc2: Work carried out with more than 40 institutions to date is based on a single principle: "Building systems that work, not just talk."
hkm.felsefe.card1.label: Behavioral Transformation
hkm.felsefe.card2.label: Strategic HR
hkm.felsefe.card3.label: Custom-Built
hkm.degerler.title: Our Principles Define Us
hkm.deger.1.title: Depth Over Surface
hkm.deger.1.desc: We design in-depth, hands-on programs that go to the core of the concept, not superficial content.
hkm.deger.2.title: Community-Focused
hkm.deger.2.desc: We build a strong community ecosystem with students, trainers and industry professionals.
hkm.deger.3.title: Continuous Innovation
hkm.deger.3.desc: Technology is changing rapidly. We update our content to reflect the most current industry needs.
hkm.deger.4.title: Results-Driven
hkm.deger.4.desc: Our goal is not diplomas, but real career success. Every program is designed around concrete outcomes.
hkm.deger.5.title: Accessibility
hkm.deger.5.desc: Quality education is a right, not a privilege. We reach everyone with scholarship and discount programs.
hkm.deger.6.title: Transparency
hkm.deger.6.desc: Student feedback is open to everyone. Our improvement processes are carried out with the community.
hkm.kurucu.name: Hakan Selahi
hkm.kurucu.role: HR Strategist · ACC Coach · Institutionalization Consultant & Trainer
hkm.kurucu.bio1: With 30+ years of experience, Hakan Selahi, founder of Derin Akademi, is one of the rare professionals who knows how corporate transformation is done in the field. With CHRO experience, consulting background across dozens of sectors and hundreds of training programs, he is a pioneer in Turkey's HR transformation ecosystem.
hkm.kurucu.bio2: Areas of expertise: Institutionalization design, performance and talent management, leadership development, strategic HR consulting.
hkm.kurucu.memberships: Adler ACC Certified Coach · NLP Practitioner · TEGEP Member · ICF Member

danis.aileden.subtitle: Establishing a corporate governance structure that supports sustainable growth in family businesses and building professional management systems.
danis.aileden.prob1: Lack of clarity in roles and responsibilities
danis.aileden.prob3: Inability to balance family members and professional managers
danis.kadro.prob1: Organizational structure not suitable for growth
danis.kadro.sol1: Analysis and redesign of the organizational structure
danis.olc.prob1: Performance reviews becoming a mere formality
danis.olc.sol2: Building a goal and KPI structure
danis.hoshin.sol1: Identifying AI use cases in HR processes
danis.hoshin.sol2: AI integration in recruitment and training processes
danis.strateji.prob1: Lack of clear direction and priorities within the organization
danis.strateji.prob2: Strategic goals not being understood by employees
danis.strateji.prob3: Strategy not being translated into operational goals
danis.strateji.sol1: Defining corporate direction through vision and mission workshops
danis.ucret.prob1: Weak perception of fairness in salary increases
danis.ucret.prob2: Compensation system misaligned with the market
danis.ucret.prob3: Inability to link performance with rewards
danis.ucret.sol1: Analysis of the existing compensation structure
danis.aileden.step1.title: Situation Analysis
danis.aileden.step1.desc: The company's current organizational structure, family dynamics and critical tension points are mapped.
danis.aileden.step2.title: Stakeholder Interviews
danis.aileden.step2.desc: In-depth interviews are conducted with family members and key managers.
danis.aileden.step3.title: Structure Design
danis.aileden.step3.desc: The organizational chart, job descriptions and authority matrix are developed together.
danis.aileden.step4.title: Family Constitution
danis.aileden.step4.desc: Dividend policies, employment rules, generational succession and conflict resolution mechanisms are formalized.
danis.aileden.step5.title: Implementation Support
danis.aileden.step5.desc: Board meetings and process coaching accompany the change journey throughout.
danis.aileden.val1.title: Corporate Governance Structure
danis.aileden.val1.desc: Clear organizational structure and management model
danis.aileden.val2.title: Roles and Responsibilities
danis.aileden.val3.title: Decision-Making Processes
danis.aileden.val4.title: Professional Management
danis.aileden.val4.desc: Balance between family and professional management
danis.aileden.quote: Institutionalization is not about the founder stepping aside — it is about building a system that preserves the founder's legacy.

danis.kadro.subtitle: Establishing the organizational structure and human resource planning that supports institutions' growth targets.
danis.kadro.quote: The right organizational structure is the foundation for placing the right people in the right positions.
danis.kadro.step1.title: Current Structure Analysis
danis.kadro.step1.desc: The company's 3-5 year growth plan is reviewed to identify workforce impacts.
danis.kadro.step2.title: Role Mapping
danis.kadro.step2.desc: Competency, performance and potential assessments are made for all employees.
danis.kadro.step3.title: Organization Design
danis.kadro.step3.desc: Gaps between future needs and current capacity are identified.
danis.kadro.step4.title: Workforce Planning
danis.kadro.step4.desc: Recruitment, training, rotation and outsourcing strategies are designed.
danis.kadro.step5.title: Implementation Support
danis.kadro.step5.desc: Quarterly plan reviews and annual strategy update mechanisms.
danis.kadro.val1.title: Organization Analysis
danis.kadro.val1.desc: Identifying strengths and weaknesses of current structure
danis.kadro.val2.title: Structure Design
danis.kadro.val3.title: Workforce Planning
danis.kadro.val4.title: Critical Roles
danis.olc.subtitle: Establishing a sustainable performance management system that measures and develops individual and team performance in alignment with organizational strategy.
danis.olc.quote: Performance management is not filling out forms — it's developing people.
danis.olc.step1.title: Current System Analysis
danis.olc.step1.desc: Strengths and weaknesses of the current evaluation process are analyzed.
danis.olc.step2.title: Model Design
danis.olc.step2.desc: OKR, MBO or hybrid model; the best approach for your institution is determined.
danis.olc.step3.title: Goal Structure
danis.olc.step3.desc: Annual cycle, check-in frequency and evaluation phases are designed.
danis.olc.step4.title: Pilot Implementation
danis.olc.step4.desc: Goal-setting forms, evaluation rubrics and development plan templates are prepared.
danis.olc.step5.title: Full Rollout
danis.olc.step5.desc: Manager training and coaching support for going live.
danis.olc.val1.title: Performance Model
danis.olc.val2.title: Goals & KPI Structure
danis.olc.val3.title: Performance Reviews
danis.olc.val4.title: Development Plans
danis.olc.val4.desc: From performance results to development plans
danis.guclen.subtitle: Building the analytics infrastructure that supports HR decisions with data.
danis.guclen.quote: You can't manage what you can't measure.
danis.guclen.step1.title: Metric Definition
danis.guclen.step1.desc: HR metrics and indicators are defined.
danis.guclen.step2.title: Data Infrastructure
danis.guclen.step2.desc: Data collection and analysis infrastructure is established.
danis.guclen.step3.title: Dashboard Design
danis.guclen.step3.desc: HR dashboards are designed and built.
danis.guclen.step4.title: Reporting

danis.strateji.subtitle: Developing the vision and mission that clarifies institutions' long-term direction, defining strategic goals and making them understandable and actionable within the organization.
danis.strateji.quote: Without a clear vision, strategy is a ship without a course.
danis.strateji.step1.title: Situation Analysis
danis.strateji.step1.desc: Current vision, mission and strategic documents are reviewed.
danis.strateji.step2.title: Stakeholder Interviews
danis.strateji.step2.desc: In-depth interviews are conducted with the management team.
danis.strateji.step3.title: Workshops
danis.strateji.step3.desc: Vision, mission and strategic goals are defined together.
danis.strateji.step4.title: Documentation
danis.strateji.step4.desc: The strategic plan and institutional values are put in writing.
danis.strateji.step5.title: Implementation Support
danis.strateji.step5.desc: Support is provided in converting strategies into operational goals.

danis.ucret.subtitle: Creating a sustainable, fair and competitive compensation and benefits system that supports employee engagement and organizational performance.
danis.ucret.quote: A fair compensation system is the foundation of employee engagement.
danis.ucret.step1.title: Compensation Analysis
danis.ucret.step1.desc: Current compensation structure and market benchmarking.
danis.ucret.step2.title: Band Design
danis.ucret.step2.desc: Compensation bands and grades are established.
danis.ucret.step3.title: Bonus System
danis.ucret.step3.desc: Bonus and incentive mechanisms are designed.
danis.ucret.step4.title: Total Reward
danis.ucret.step4.desc: Total reward approach framework is established.
danis.ucret.step5.title: Implementation Support
danis.ucret.step5.desc: System implementation and periodic updates are planned.

danis.yetenek.subtitle: Building a systematic talent management approach that enables institutions to attract, develop and retain the right talent.
danis.yetenek.quote: Attracting the right talent requires as much strategic effort as developing and retaining them.
danis.yetenek.step1.title: Current State
danis.yetenek.step1.desc: Recruitment and talent management processes are analyzed.

shared.egitim.h3.problems: Which Problems Do Organizations Solve with This Training?
shared.egitim.h3.gains: What Do Organizations Gain After This Training?
egitim.liderlik.desc1: In today's organizations, leaders are expected not just to manage operations, but also to adopt a leadership approach that motivates their teams, supports their development, and strengthens organizational culture. This training aims for managers to move beyond classic management understanding and develop a leadership approach focused on trust, development, and performance.
egitim.liderlik.content1: The changing role of leadership in today's organizations, creating an environment of trust and psychological safety, coaching-style leadership approach, empowerment and delegation, the leader's impact on corporate culture and performance.
egitim.liderlik.problems1: Managers struggling to increase team motivation, low employee engagement, management style being too control and instruction-oriented, weak environment of trust within the team, managers struggling to support team development.
egitim.liderlik.gains1: Trust-based team culture, higher employee engagement, empowerment and delegation, development-oriented leadership approach.
egitim.liderlik.outcome1: Leadership behaviors that increase team performance
egitim.haddini.desc1: In many organizations, performance issues grow because they are not addressed in time, creating communication problems within teams. This training helps managers develop the skills to deliver open and constructive feedback and handle difficult conversations effectively.
egitim.haddini.content1: The importance of a feedback culture, constructive feedback techniques, managing difficult conversations, performance interviews, behavior-based communication.
egitim.haddini.problems1: Performance issues not being addressed in time, managers avoiding feedback, difficult conversations being postponed, communication problems within teams growing.
egitim.haddini.gains1: An open and trust-based communication environment, a constructive feedback culture, the ability to manage performance issues early, stronger manager–employee relationships.
egitim.haddini.outcome1: An open and trust-based communication environment
egitim.haddini.outcome3: The ability to manage performance issues early
egitim.kapsayan.desc1: Organizations that effectively manage diverse perspectives and diversity achieve higher innovation and performance. This training supports managers in adopting an inclusive leadership approach and turning differences within teams into advantages.
egitim.kapsayan.content1: The concept of diversity and inclusion, unconscious biases, managing diverse teams, inclusive decision-making processes, organizational culture and inclusive leadership.
egitim.kapsayan.problems1: Diverse perspectives not being fully valued, communication and collaboration issues between teams, diversity not being fully leveraged within the organization, a lack of inclusivity in organizational culture.
egitim.kapsayan.gains1: A team culture that values diverse perspectives, stronger team collaboration, an inclusive organizational culture, a higher creativity and innovation environment.
egitim.kapsayan.outcome2: Turning diverse perspectives into organizational advantages
egitim.mulakat.desc1: Wrong hiring decisions create high costs for organizations. This training aims to more accurately assess candidate competencies through behavior-based interview techniques and to systematize recruitment processes.
egitim.mulakat.content1: Competency-based interview approach, behavioral questioning techniques, the STAR method, interview errors and biases, and candidate evaluation techniques are covered.
egitim.mulakat.problems.html:
• ✗ Wrong hiring decisions
  • ✗ Interviews based on personal interpretations
  • ✗ Lack of standardization in the candidate evaluation process
  • ✗ Inability to accurately measure competencies
egitim.mulakat.gains.html:
• ✓ Competency-based interview approach
  • ✓ More accurate hiring decisions
  • ✓ Standardization in interview processes
  • ✓ Improved candidate experience
egitim.perf360.desc1: Performance management is not limited to year-end evaluations. This training aims to establish a sustainable and development-focused performance management system in organizations.
egitim.perf360.content1: Performance system design, management by objectives and OKR approach, 360-degree feedback system, performance reviews and the creation of development plans are covered.
egitim.perf360.problems.html:
• ✗ Performance reviews becoming a formality
  • ✗ Unclear goals
  • ✗ Performance discussions not happening or remaining superficial
  • ✗ Performance outcomes not translating into development
egitim.perf360.gains.html:
• ✓ Performance management with clear goals
  • ✓ A transparent and fair evaluation system
  • ✓ Development-focused performance reviews
  • ✓ An organizational performance culture
egitim.perf360.outcome2: A fair and transparent evaluation system
egitim.stratejik.desc1: For HR to make a real contribution to organizational strategy, a strategic perspective and the right tools are needed. This training supports HR professionals in positioning themselves as strategic business partners within the organization.
egitim.stratejik.content1: The strategic role of HR, the HRBP approach, strategic workforce planning, HR metrics and dashboard design, measuring HR's contribution to business outcomes.
egitim.stratejik.problems1: HR remaining limited to operational tasks, HR processes not sufficiently linked to organizational strategy, HR struggling to communicate its value to management, HR decisions based on intuition rather than data.
egitim.stratejik.gains1: A strategic HR approach, HR practices aligned with organizational strategy, data-supported HR decisions, a stronger business partnership with management.
egitim.stratejik.outcome1: Aligning HR strategy with organizational strategy
egitim.stratejik.outcome3: Increasing the impact of the HR function
egitim.ucret.desc1: Why do employees leave? Research shows that pay is often not the primary reason. Lack of recognition, absence of growth opportunities, a sense of meaninglessness, and relationship problems with managers are far more decisive factors.
egitim.ucret.content1: Employee engagement research and causality analysis, the Total Rewards framework and its components, meaning and purpose management, career development and growth path design, recognition and reward systems, flexible work and work-life balance practices, and burnout prevention strategies are covered.
egitim.ucret.content2: This training is designed not only for HR, but for all managers. Because employee engagement is a result of managers' daily behaviors and decisions. At the end of the training, participants create a customized "Engagement Action Plan" for their teams.
egitim.ucret.desc2: Beyond Pay training centers the "Total Rewards" concept to teach you how to build employee engagement through non-monetary factors. This is a high-impact, low-cost leadership and HR skill.
egitim.ucret.outcome1: Adapting the Total Rewards approach to the organization
egitim.ucret.outcome4: Offering career paths and development opportunities
egitim.ucret.outcome6: Early detection and prevention of burnout
egitim.veri.desc1: One of modern HR's most powerful tools is the competency of data-driven decision-making (People Analytics). What factors trigger employee turnover? Which training programs truly contribute to business outcomes? These questions can now be answered — with data.
egitim.veri.content1: Introduction to People Analytics and the maturity model, HR metrics and KPIs (turnover rate, absenteeism, cost-per-hire, etc.), descriptive, diagnostic, predictive, and prescriptive analytics levels, basic HR analysis applications with Excel/Google Sheets, HR dashboard design, presenting analysis results to management, and storytelling from data to decision are covered.
egitim.veri.content2: Throughout the training, participants work with real (anonymized) data sets. At the end of the program, each participant prepares a basic HR analytics report template for their department.
egitim.veri.desc2: HR Driven by Data is a practice-oriented training that equips HR professionals with essential data analysis and People Analytics skills. No technical expertise is required; it focuses on HR's ability to understand and use data.
egitim.veri.outcome3: Demonstrating HR's contribution to business outcomes
egitim.yz.desc1: Artificial intelligence is now knocking on HR's door. Resume screening, interview evaluation, employee well-being monitoring, recommendation systems, chatbots, and more... AI has the potential to fundamentally transform HR processes.
egitim.yz.content1: The general impact of AI on HR and the maturity model, AI in recruitment: ATS, resume screening, pre-interview tools, personalized learning systems in training and development, chatbots and self-service HR in employee experience, analytics and predictive models, AI ethics and bias risk, evaluating your current HR technology stack, and integrating ChatGPT/AI assistants into HR workflows are covered.
egitim.yz.content2: Throughout the training, real AI tools are experienced. At the end of the program, participants produce an "AI Integration Roadmap" for their own organizations.
egitim.yz.desc2: AI in HR training moves HR professionals from being passive observers of this transformation to active shapers. No technical coding knowledge is required; but using AI tools consciously, ethically, and strategically can be learned.
egitim.yz.outcome1: Effectively using AI tools in recruitment
egitim.yz.outcome3: Implementing chatbot and self-service HR models
egitim.yz.outcome4: Managing AI ethics and bias risks
egitim.yz.target4: HR professionals interested in digital transformation
egitim.aidiyet.desc1: Employee engagement is built not just through motivation activities, but through well-designed systems. This training aims to holistically design and manage the employee experience.
egitim.aidiyet.content1: The concept of employee experience, employee journey mapping, engagement factors, organizational culture and experience design, and feedback mechanisms are covered.
egitim.aidiyet.problems.html:
• ✗ Low employee engagement
  • ✗ Organizational culture not sufficiently reflected in employee experience
  • ✗ Employee feedback not being evaluated systematically
  • ✗ High employee turnover rate
egitim.aidiyet.gains.html:
• ✓ A strong employee experience approach
  • ✓ Increased employee engagement
  • ✓ Strengthened organizational culture
  • ✓ Increased employee satisfaction
tsc.tamay.text: Thank you for the fruitful collaboration, Derin Akademi & Hakan Selahi 🙏 A thought-provoking piece, congratulations 👏🏻
tsc.nilay.text: Hakan Bey, best of luck. The HR professionals who work with you are very fortunate — there is so much to learn from you.
tsc.burak.text: We had the opportunity to work with Hakan and team as a strategic partner of Bayer Cropscience on two different projects. With their expertise and solution-oriented approach, they always made a difference. The valuable perspectives shared during the consulting process were truly inspiring. Wishing them continued success.
tsc.neslihan.text: I absolutely agree. Hakan Bey is an excellent instructor.
tsc.onur.text: What a great program! I have personally experienced how this training — which emphasizes the importance of a strategic HR approach in staying strong during difficult times — and Derin Akademi’s other programs develop business professionals and organizations through Hakan Bey’s expertise. As a leader who greatly values adapting to changing economic conditions and positioning the right talent, I believe programs like this are extremely beneficial for participants. Congratulations, Hakan Selahi 👏🏻
